title: crepis salzmannii
intro: Crepis salzmannii, also known as Salzmann's hawk's beard or mountain hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, Crepis salzmannii has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Crepis salzmannii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves, tinctures, and other formulations.
